name: test-strategies
description: Run tests for the 4 current HierarchicalCESVM strategies
instructions:
Execute the hierarchical CESVM test suite to verify the current strategy interface.

**What it tests:**
- Current strategies: single_filter, multiple_filter, inverted, test3
- 3-class strategy behavior
- N-class test3 behavior
- Prediction logic and model summaries
- Edge cases and invalid strategy handling

**Usage:**
```bash
# Run all strategy tests
source .venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/test_hierarchical.py -v

# Run specific test class
source .venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/test_hierarchical.py::TestHierarchicalCESVMFixedStrategies -v

# Run all tests with coverage
source .venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/ -v --cov=src/hcesvm
```

Run the test suite now to verify the current strategies.
